hero.title: Built for the line
hero.subtitle: Heavy-duty machinery, engineered for high-stakes commercial kitchens. Browse by department or explore our most-specified gear.

q1.question: Do you deliver and install?
q1.answer: Yes. Every order includes delivery to your loading bay, and certified installation is available across the mainland for an additional fee quoted at checkout.

q2.question: What warranty do machines carry?
q2.answer: All REHOBOT equipment ships with a 2-year parts-and-labour warranty. Extended cover up to 5 years is available on cooking and refrigeration lines.

q3.question: Can I get a custom specification?
q3.answer: Absolutely. Our engineering team can tailor dimensions, power ratings and finishes for fit-outs. Contact us with your floor plan to start a quote.

q4.question: What are your lead times?
q4.answer: In-stock items dispatch within 48 hours. Made-to-order and custom units typically ship in 3-5 weeks depending on configuration.

footer.blurb: REHOBOT builds heavy-duty commercial kitchen equipment, specified to the millimetre and engineered to last.
